# Total Turf & Auto

> Full-service auto and diesel repair shop in Topeka, Kansas. Locally owned and operated by Ryan, focused on honest inspections, fair pricing, and quality workmanship for cars, trucks, and diesels.

## Business details

- Name: Total Turf & Auto
- Address: 2700 NW Topeka Blvd, Topeka, KS 66617
- Phone: (785) 925-4040 (call or text)
- Email: totalturfandauto@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Service area: Topeka, Shawnee County, and surrounding Kansas communities

## Services

- [Routine Maintenance](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#maintenance): Oil changes, fluids, filters, tune-ups, and factory-scheduled service.
- [Diesel Repair](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#diesel): Diagnostics, maintenance, and repairs for diesel trucks.
- [Brakes & Tires](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#brakes): Brake pads, rotors, tire rotation, balancing, and alignment checks.
- [Engine Service & Replacement](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#engine): Check-engine diagnostics, engine repairs, and complete engine replacement.
- [Vehicle Inspections](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#inspections): Thorough multi-point and pre-purchase inspections.
- [Diagnostics & Electrical](https://www.totalturfandauto.com/services#diagnostics): Computer diagnostics, battery, starting, charging, and electrical repairs.
